meaning: n.小杯,少量饮料(常指四分之一品脱)
examples: So, if you don't want to slow down for your own good, do it for the good of your noggin.
The same reaction occurred within the brains of living (unexercised) mice given large doses of Noggin.
Here's the recipe -- straight from the secret recipe file in Jason's avocado-shaped noggin.
Thankfully, a new invention out of Japan promises to keep surgeons from taking practice swings at your noggin.
